chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1815 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.9159/2025. 2. For orders on M.A. No.4322/2025. 08.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Jamil, advocate for petitioner. == 1. Urgent application is granted. 2. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner intends to avail the remedy before the competent authority in terms of this Court’s order dated 20.03.2025, as such, he does not press this application which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
